pages.name: page_home
pages.label: Home
pages.description: Cyberpunk crypto trading hero with headline 'Trade at Light Speed'; real-time ticker bar simulation; 4 market summary cards (BTC, ETH, SOL, AVAX) with green/red percentage pills.

pages.name: page_markets
pages.label: Markets
pages.description: Dense markets table with 15 rows showing Asset, Price, 24h Change, Volume, and Trade CTA button; filter tabs at top.

pages.name: page_trade
pages.label: Trade
pages.description: Advanced trading interface layout; left chart placeholder, middle order book simulation (green buy rows, red sell rows), right order placement form (Buy/Sell tabs, limit price, amount, place order button).

pages.name: page_earn
pages.label: Earn
pages.description: Staking and yield farming page; 6 staking pool cards (APY 12%, 18%, 24%) with stake/unstake action buttons.

pages.name: page_wallet
pages.label: Wallet
pages.description: User wallet dashboard simulation; total balance display ($45,210.80); asset allocation pie chart placeholder; recent transaction history list.
